name: Tropical Raft Sundaes
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a 13x9 inch pan with non-stick cooking spray.
2. Melt margarine in a large saucepan over low heat. Add marshmallows and stir until completely melted.
3. Remove from heat and stir in cereal until well coated. Scrape into prepared pan.
4. Coat a sheet of waxed paper with cooking spray, place on cereal mixture and press into pan evenly. Cool completely.
5. Meanwhile, slice strawberries. Place about 1 1/4 cups in a blender. Add sugar; puree until smooth.
6. To serve: Invert cereal mixture onto a cutting board. Cut into 10 bars.
7. Place 1 bar on each plate, spoon on some strawberry puree, top with fruits, sherbert and more puree.
8. For extra splash, top with whipped cream and a cherry.
Per serving: 356 calories, 3g protein, 78g carbohydrates, 3g fibre, 6g fat (2 saturated), 4mg cholesterol, 244mg sodium
